summary: 棕榈油P0连续合约当前实时价9369，日内短线偏多，1小时和2小时K线均站上布林中轨，RSI回升至中性偏强，但日线仍受MA10/20压制，整体处于震荡反弹格局。
analysis: 1小时布林通道：当前价9362位于中轨9258.1上方，距上轨9430.01约68点，带宽0.0371，通道开口平稳，价格从下轨反弹后站稳中轨，短线动能偏多。
2小时布林通道：当前价9362位于中轨9304.65上方，距上轨9446.68约85点，带宽0.0305，通道略收窄，价格突破中轨后延续上行，中期反弹趋势确认。
实时价位置：实时价9369高于1小时中轨9258.1和2小时中轨9304.65，且高于日线MA10（9304.4），但低于MA20（9410.55），处于短期均线之间，多空争夺中。
趋势：1小时和2小时K线连续收阳，从6月25日低点9029反弹至当前9369，涨幅约3.8%，短期上升趋势明显，但需关注前高9395-9400压力。
量能：6月26日成交量751864手，高于20日均量1.2倍，显示反弹放量；实时成交量342476手，日内活跃度较高，资金参与积极。
支撑压力：下方支撑参考1小时中轨9258和2小时中轨9305，以及日线低点9028；上方压力关注1小时上轨9430、2小时上轨9447及日线MA20（9410）。
RSI指标：1小时RSI 57.51，2小时RSI 53.86，均处于中性偏强区域，未超买，仍有上行空间。
日线背景：日线RSI 45.62仍低于50，价格在MA10和MA20下方，中期趋势偏弱，但日内反弹已突破MA10，若站稳则有望测试MA20。

intraday_strategy.entry: 回踩1小时中轨9258-9280区域或2小时中轨9305附近做多
intraday_strategy.stop: 跌破1小时下轨9086或日线低点9028止损
intraday_strategy.take_profit: 第一目标1小时上轨9430，第二目标2小时上轨9447
intraday_strategy.invalidation: 若价格跌破9250且1小时RSI回到50以下，则多头失效
intraday_strategy.notes: 日内短线以回调做多为主，注意前高9395-9400压力，若放量突破可加仓；若冲高回落至中轨下方则转观望。

news_impact: [利多] 印尼B40生物柴油政策持续推进，2026年棕榈油用于生物柴油的需求预计增加200万吨，直接提振产地消费，支撑价格。
[利空] 马来西亚6月前25日棕榈油出口环比下降16%，主要因印度进口放缓，库存压力上升，短期压制价格。
[中性] 印度5月植物油进口量环比下降12%，但棕榈油占比仍高，后续采购节奏取决于价格和库存，影响不确定。
[利多] 印尼上调7月棕榈油出口参考价至每吨820美元，出口税相应提高，增加出口成本，利多期货价格。
[利空] 全球大豆油供应充裕，豆棕价差持续收窄，部分买家转向豆油，替代效应削弱棕榈油需求。
[中性] 产区天气正常，马来西亚6月产量预计环比增长5%，季节性增产符合预期，对价格影响有限。

news_articles.title: Indonesia's B40 biodiesel mandate to boost palm oil demand in 2026
news_articles.detail: Indonesia is pushing ahead with its B40 biodiesel mandate, requiring 40% palm oil-based biodiesel blend, which is expected to increase palm oil consumption by 2 million tonnes in 2026. This policy supports domestic demand and provides a floor for prices.

news_articles.title: Malaysia palm oil exports fall 16% in first 25 days of June
news_articles.detail: According to cargo surveyors, Malaysia's palm oil exports for June 1-25 dropped 16% month-on-month, mainly due to lower purchases from India and China. The decline adds to inventory buildup concerns.

news_articles.title: India's vegetable oil imports dip in May, palm oil share remains high
news_articles.detail: India imported 1.1 million tonnes of vegetable oils in May, down 12% from April, but palm oil accounted for 65% of total. Refiners are cautious due to high inventory, but demand may pick up ahead of festivals.

news_articles.title: Indonesia raises July palm oil reference price, export levy up
news_articles.detail: Indonesia set the July palm oil reference price at $820 per tonne, up from $795 in June, increasing the export levy to $90 per tonne. Higher export costs may reduce shipments and support futures.

news_articles.title: Soybean oil supply weighs on palm oil premium
news_articles.detail: Abundant global soybean oil supply has narrowed the price premium of palm oil over soybean oil, prompting some buyers to switch. This substitution effect could cap palm oil's upside.

news_articles.title: Malaysia palm oil production seen rising 5% in June
news_articles.detail: Malaysian Palm Oil Board estimates June production at 1.65 million tonnes, up 5% from May, as seasonal high crop period begins. Normal weather supports output, but labor issues persist.

news_articles.title: China's palm oil imports rebound in June on lower prices
news_articles.detail: China's palm oil imports in June are estimated at 600,000 tonnes, up 15% from May, as lower prices attract buying. However, port inventories remain high at 800,000 tonnes.

news_articles.title: CPO futures rebound on short-covering, technical buying
news_articles.detail: Malaysian crude palm oil futures rebounded from a two-month low on short-covering and technical buying, with the benchmark contract rising 2% on June 26. Traders cite oversold conditions.

risk_note: 以上分析基于当前技术指标和公开舆情，不构成投资建议。期货交易风险高，请根据自身风险承受能力谨慎决策。
